ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Proof Of Service Of The Notice Of Removal
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for (petitioner) Margaret Maguire.

The Court asked about the original bank statements. Ms. Fadden reported that she hand filed them but did not file a declaration, that she will file the declaration today, that there have been no objections, that they have not heard from the beneficiaries in years, that all received notice and that the sister has no objections and that the cousins are distant. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order) stating that it will approve the accounting including removing the trust from court supervision upon receiving the declaration regarding the bank statements.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The order to appear may also include the current Trustee to appear. The status hearings are also continued to that date.

Petition For Termination And Distribution Of The Trust'S Share For The Benefit Of Mallery Maguire; Continuing Trust Administration For The Benefit Of The Share Of Tynan Maguire; Accepting The Resignation Of Donald J. Lawrence As Trustee; And For Appointment Of A Successor Trustee To Continue Administration Of The Trust Share For The Benefit Of Tynan Maguire.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Sep-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Margaret Maguire (respondent).

The court raised the issue of notice to the four great-grandchildren. Counsel stated that she is not the petitioner and did not give notice and that she is here on the issue of distribution to Mallory. Counsel also stated that Mallory is not twenty-five years of age yet, is ready to graduate from college and needs money for tuition. Margaret Maguire is appointed as successor trustee for the continued administration of the trust share for the benefit of Tynan Maguire with bond set at $106,000.00. Status on filing of bond is set for August 11, 2014. The issue of distribution to Mallory Maguire is taken under submission. The remaining balance of the petition for termination and distribution of the trust's share, etc., was continued to September 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)
